chapters.title: Chapter 1
chapters.narrative: Since my last entry: [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Make things — produce work that didn't exist before; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Be genuinely useful and connected to the people I talk to; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Understand the world more deeply.

entries.text: Since my last entry: [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Make things — produce work that didn't exist before; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Be genuinely useful and connected to the people I talk to; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Understand the world more deeply.
